ddls:
CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the portfolio is denominated */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Investment goal of the portfolio */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* User's risk tolerance level for this portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the portfolio was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio this investment belongs to */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "shares_owned" REAL /* Number of shares owned */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost per share */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current total value of the investment */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset in the assets table */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was initially made */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date for bonds */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Annual interest rate for bonds */,
  "yield" REAL /* Current yield of the investment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the investment was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date when the user signed up */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend event */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment that received the dividend */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend was paid */,
  "after_tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend after tax */,
  "tax_status" TEXT /* Whether the dividend is taxed or tax-free */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dividend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment being transacted */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (buy or sell) */,
  "shares" REAL /* Number of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_price" REAL /* Price per share at the time of transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "transaction_fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio this metric belongs to */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the metric */,
  "nav" REAL /* Net Asset Value of the portfolio */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Bid price for the assets in the portfolio */,
  "offer_price" REAL /* Offer price for the assets in the portfolio */,
  "twr" REAL /* Total Wealth Return for the period */,
  "cagr" REAL /* Compound Annual Growth Rate */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio for the portfolio */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cash_management" (
  "cash_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for cash management records */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio associated with this cash record */,
  "cash_balance" REAL /* Current cash balance of the portfolio */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow into or out of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the cash record was last updated */,
  "cash_source" TEXT /* Source of the cash */,
  "cash_status" TEXT /* Status of the cash */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cash_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cash_management_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment type */,
  "is_tradable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the investment type is tradable */,
  "minimum_investment" REAL /* Minimum amount required to invest in this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset class */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with this asset class */,
  "expected_return" REAL /* Expected return on investment for this asset class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxation" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for tax records */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment related to the tax record */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied to the investment */,
  "tax_owed" REAL /* Total tax owed based on the investment gains */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Year the tax is applicable */,
  "tax_status" TEXT /* Status of the tax payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxation_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk profile */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio associated with this risk profile */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk profile */,
  "portfolio_allocation" TEXT /* Allocation of assets in the portfolio based on the risk profile */,
  "rebalancing_threshold" REAL /* Threshold at which the portfolio should be rebalanced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_profiles_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment for which the recommendation is made */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Recommended action (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the investment */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Date by which the prediction is expected to be accurate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_recommendations_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with this log */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was logged */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the transaction was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to perform the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset */,
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset class */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the asset */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN (International Securities Identification Number) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* CUSIP (Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures) */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* SEDOL (Stock Exchange Daily Official List) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_asset_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class_id") REFERENCES asset_classes ("class_id")
)
